name: Question
about: Ask about usage, design decisions, or how something works
title: '[question] '

## Your question

<!--
Ask in whatever form is natural — prose, code, or both. Questions
are first-class contributions; every question answered here helps
the next person.
-->

## What you already tried

<!--
If you've read a demo, a test, or a docstring and it didn't answer
your question, linking it here helps us improve the docs.
-->

## Context

<!--
Optional: what are you ultimately trying to do? Sometimes the right
answer to a question is a different approach entirely, but we can
only see that if we know the bigger picture.
-->
